authority_dark.lightingBrief: Deep navy background with subtle geometric grid texture at low opacity. Single radial glow in sky-blue at 3 percent opacity at the top center. High contrast white text. Professional-aggressive aesthetic. No warm tones.
authority_dark.skyDescriptor: Dark near-black (#0F1923) with faint grid pattern overlay
authority_dark.shadowDescriptor: No dramatic cast shadows. Subtle drop-shadows on card components only.

founder_portrait.lightingBrief: Clean studio or office lighting on a single founder subject. Left-side gradient fade from the dark background blending into the founder photo on the right half. Natural professional clothing. Confident posture. No smile required.
founder_portrait.skyDescriptor: Clean studio background or blurred office interior at far right
founder_portrait.shadowDescriptor: Soft directional side-lighting. No harsh shadows on face.

geometric_precision.lightingBrief: Abstract geometric grid or data-visualization pattern at 8 percent opacity over the dark background. Accent color lines (#0EA5E9) at very low opacity. Signals precision and systems thinking. No organic shapes.
geometric_precision.skyDescriptor: None -- pure dark background with SVG pattern overlay

bright_midday_clean.lightingBrief: Clean, bright office or neutral background with even lighting. Used for about-page founder portrait or team photos. White walls, natural window light, professional setting.
bright_midday_clean.skyDescriptor: White or light gray neutral background
bright_midday_clean.shadowDescriptor: Minimal soft shadows from window light

overcast_calm.lightingBrief: Overcast diffused light. Calm, professional. Used for team photos in outdoor or semi-outdoor settings. Even skin tones, no harsh shadows.
overcast_calm.skyDescriptor: Overcast sky or neutral gray background
